'''鈭歸-l-s''' ('''kawalas''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quill|quill]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-l-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quill|quill]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歸-l-s
|-
! Lemma
| kawalas
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thiwalas|thiwalas]] || [[word:jiwalas|jiwalas]] || [[word:shiwalas|shiwalas]] || [[word:kiwalas|kiwalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuwalas|thuthuwalas]] || [[word:jujuwalas|jujuwalas]] || [[word:shushuwalas|shushuwalas]] || [[word:kukuwalas|kukuwalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuwalas|thuwalas]] || [[word:juwalas|juwalas]] || [[word:shuwalas|shuwalas]] || [[word:kuwalas|kuwalas]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuwalas|thuwalas]] || [[word:juwalas|juwalas]] || [[word:shuwalas|shuwalas]] || [[word:kuwalas|kuwalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thewalas|thewalas]] || [[word:jewalas|jewalas]] || [[word:shewalas|shewalas]] || [[word:kewalas|kewalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothowalas|thothowalas]] || [[word:jojowalas|jojowalas]] || [[word:shoshowalas|shoshowalas]] || [[word:kokowalas|kokowalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thowalas|thowalas]] || [[word:jowalas|jowalas]] || [[word:showalas|showalas]] || [[word:kowalas|kowalas]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thowalas|thowalas]] || [[word:jowalas|jowalas]] || [[word:showalas|showalas]] || [[word:kowalas|kowalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙walas|th忙walas]] || [[word:j忙walas|j忙walas]] || [[word:sh忙walas|sh忙walas]] || [[word:k忙walas|k忙walas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathawalas|thathawalas]] || [[word:jajawalas|jajawalas]] || [[word:shashawalas|shashawalas]] || [[word:kakawalas|kakawalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thawalas|thawalas]] || [[word:jawalas|jawalas]] || [[word:shawalas|shawalas]] || [[word:kawalas|kawalas]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thawalas|thawalas]] || [[word:jawalas|jawalas]] || [[word:shawalas|shawalas]] || [[word:kawalas|kawalas]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shawalas|shawalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshawalas|goshawalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishawalas|gokishawalas]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shawalasn眉|shawalasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshawalasnkn眉|goshawalasnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalasn眉|gokishawalasn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shawalash毛|shawalash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshawalasnksh毛|goshawalasnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishawalash毛|gokishawalash毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalasro|shawalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalasnkro|goshawalasnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalasro|gokishawalasro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalasmu|shawalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalasnkmu|goshawalasnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalasmu|gokishawalasmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shawalasher|shawalasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshawalasnksher|goshawalasnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishawalasher|gokishawalasher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shawalasng|shawalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshawalasnkng|goshawalasnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishawalasng|gokishawalasng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shawalasya|shawalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshawalasnkya|goshawalasnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishawalasya|gokishawalasya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shawalasyam|shawalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshawalasnkyam|goshawalasnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishawalasyam|gokishawalasyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawalasn眉sh毛|shawalasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawalasnkn眉sh毛|goshawalasnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawalasn眉sh毛|gokishawalasn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalasn眉ro|shawalasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalasnkn眉ro|goshawalasnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalasn眉ro|gokishawalasn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalasn眉mu|shawalasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalasnkn眉mu|goshawalasnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalasn眉mu|gokishawalasn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawalash毛n眉|shawalash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawalasnksh毛n眉|goshawalasnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalash毛n眉|gokishawalash毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalash毛ro|shawalash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalasnksh毛ro|goshawalasnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalash毛ro|gokishawalash毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalash毛mu|shawalash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalasnksh毛mu|goshawalasnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalash毛mu|gokishawalash毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawalasron眉|shawalasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawalasnkron眉|goshawalasnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalasron眉|gokishawalasron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawalasrosh毛|shawalasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawalasnkrosh毛|goshawalasnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawalasrosh毛|gokishawalasrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shawalasromu|shawalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshawalasnkromu|goshawalasnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishawalasromu|gokishawalasromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shawalasmun眉|shawalasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshawalasnkmun眉|goshawalasnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishawalasmun眉|gokishawalasmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shawalasmush毛|shawalasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshawalasnkmush毛|goshawalasnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishawalasmush毛|gokishawalasmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shawalasmuro|shawalasmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshawalasnkmuro|goshawalasnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishawalasmuro|gokishawalasmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
